sql.query: SELECT id,locationName,locationType,addressLine1,addressLine2,townCity,countyRegion,postcode,country,telephone,email,website,directions,accessibilityNotes,generalNotes,isActive FROM tbl_locations WHERE id=:id AND tenantId=:tenantId LIMIT 1

SELECT id,locationId,spaceName,spaceType,description,defaultCapacity,accessibilityNotes,sortOrder,isActive FROM tbl_spaces WHERE locationId=:locationId AND tenantId=:tenantId ORDER BY isActive DESC,sortOrder,spaceName

SELECT c.id,c.spaceId,c.configurationName,c.description,c.seatedCapacity,c.standingCapacity,c.maximumTotalCapacity,c.staffCrewAllowance,c.setupMinutes,c.resetMinutes,c.minimumStaff,c.minimumSecurityStaff,c.accessibilityNotes,c.operationalNotes,c.sortOrder,c.isDefault,c.isActive FROM tbl_space_configurations c INNER JOIN tbl_spaces s ON s.id=c.spaceId AND s.tenantId=c.tenantId WHERE s.locationId=:locationId AND c.tenantId=:tenantId ORDER BY s.sortOrder,s.spaceName,c.isActive DESC,c.sortOrder,c.configurationName
